title: Mayor Boodle Forgives the Straw Hats
description: On pages 1–4, Orange Town deals with the aftermath of Buggy’s defeat, while Luffy, Zoro, and Nami decide what they will carry away from the island.
scene: Buggy’s threat has been broken, but the town is still tense: the villagers, Mayor Boodle, Chouchou, and the Straw Hats all react to the damage left behind.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Victory!!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Now you're gonna become my crew member, right?

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: I'm just cooperating with you while it serves my purpose, remember that!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: I'll say okay for now, since it seems that if I go along with you guys I'll be able to earn a lot!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Buggy said that he only takes the best treasures for himself, so this bag's contents are of the highest quality!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: This much treasure should be worthat least 10 million bell!!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: I've divided it into two bags so you hold half of it. This treasure is so heavy that carrying it alone is difficult.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: that hat... is it that precious to you??

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Yeah, but it's alright

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Pulls!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: I feel better now that I got rid of buggy!!

dialogue.speaker: Buggy Pirate
dialogue.text: ...Hey, Captain buggy got knocked out of sight

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: What... Should we do?

dialogue.speaker: Buggy Pirate
dialogue.text: For now let's pretend we're still passed out

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: That's a good idea

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Zoro, get up!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Let's go

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Hmm?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Did you finish the fight...?

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Yeah, we also got the map and the treasure

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: ...Aah I don't think I can walk yet

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Feels Dizzy...

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Obviously! If you guys can still walk, then you aren't human...

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Why did you include me?

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: You're the weirdest!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Oh yeah

dialogue.speaker: Mayor Boodle
dialogue.text: I'll wake up the chief!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: You guys...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: We're the people of this village

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Did the pirates stir up a fight amongst them- selves...? If you know anything please tell us...

summary: The part closes the Orange Town conflict by shifting from combat to consequences: treasure, forgiveness, pride, and the Straw Hats’ departure.
